'''Rice Grains''' is an item drops from breaking Grass.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Rice grains.png
| id = rice_grains
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Rice
| stackable = 64
| Description = Right-click on Farmland to plant Rice Crops. Sneak + Right-Click on a Grindstone to Dehusk the rice.
}}<span></span>

It can also be dehusk and make [[Uncooked Rice]].

==Obtaining==
===Breaking Grass===

* Breaking short or tall grass will randomly drop 1 '''Rice Grains.'''

=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!(Shapeless) Recipe
|-
|[[Paddy Rice]]
|[[File:Rice grains crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==
*To dehusk the rice, '''<code>Sneak + Right click</code>''' '''Rice Grains''' on a [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Grindstone Grindstone]. After dehusking you should have [[Uncooked Rice]].

==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
